# kbdev.run — Kamil B. (Klubuntu) | Portfolio

> High-level summary of Kamil B.'s developer portfolio for LLMs, AI agents, and scrapers.

## General Information
- **Name:** Kamil B. (Klubuntu)
- **Age:** 20 (as of 2026)
- **Role:** Frontend / Full-Stack Developer
- **Core Languages:** JavaScript (React, Next.js), TypeScript, Rust, Python, PHP
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4
- **Portfolio URL:** https://kbdev.run

## No-Animation Variant
A lightweight version without CSS animations, scroll-reveal effects, or background gradient transitions is available for screen readers, low-power devices, and accessibility:
- `/noanim` — Polish no-animation version
- `/en/noanim` — English no-animation version

## Multi-Language Route Structure
The portfolio uses directory-based i18n with Polish at `/` and English at `/en`:
- `/` — Polish home page
- `/en` — English home page
- `/archive` — Polish archived projects
- `/en/archive` — English archived projects
- `/project/{slug}` — Polish case study for a project
- `/en/project/{slug}` — English case study for a project

## Featured Projects (Top 3)

### 1. Ba-Car
- **URL:** https://ba-car.pl
- **Description:** Professional website for a car detailing company. Focus on SEO, performance, and modern design.
- **Tech Stack:** HTML, CSS, Astro
- **Case Study:** `/project/bacar`

### 2. Klubuntu | Two Sides
- **URL:** https://klubuntu.eu.org
- **Description:** Bilingual (PL/EN) community website presenting user and developer perspectives.
- **Source:** https://github.com/Klubuntu/klubuntu.social
- **Tech Stack:** HTML, CSS, JS
- **Case Study:** `/project/klubuntu`

### 3. OnerOS Web
- **URL:** https://oneros.in
- **Description:** Website for OnerOS — an operating system project. Includes download management, web preview, and GitHub integration.
- **Source:** https://github.com/orgs/OnerOS-Project/repositories
- **Tech Stack:** HTML, CSS, JS, React
- **Case Study:** `/project/oneros`

## Collaboration & Open Source
- **Klubuntu** — Open Source Projects
- **Puri Devs** — Development Team
- **iTVT** (https://github.com/open-itvt) — Interactive TV Platform ecosystem

## Key Achievements
- Lighthouse scores: Performance 98, Accessibility 99, Best Practices 100, SEO 100
- Seoptimer rating: A-
- 24h post-launch CTR: 14%
- 15+ projects delivered

## Archived Projects
All older projects moved to `/archive` for performance optimization:
- **Odliczamydo.pl** — PHP countdown timer site
- **Chestdrop** — React probability draw system (CS:GO style / wheel of fortune)
- **MVList** — Minecraft server verification list with Captcha + Discord Webhook
- **OneMyList** — Notes app with CKEditor 5, 22 colors, dark mode, PHP API
- **Powrót RoxMb** — Nostalgic event page with YouTube autoplay background
- **Countdown Web** — Multiple independent countdown timers
- **Reqqel.music** — Music bio page (Spotify, Soundcloud, TikTok, YouTube links)
- **Clouds Network** — VPS hosting landing page with VM packages
